name: USS PC-1127 (PC-1127)
events: 15 Dec 1944 Around 1020 K/15, USS Spot (T/Cdr. W.S. Post, Jr., USN), USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) and USS Balao (T/Cdr. M.R. de Arellano, USN) arrived at Saipan. They were escorted in by USS PC 1127 (Lt.(jg) G.O. Pratt, USNR) which had joined around 0600 K/15.
At Saipan the submarines were taken in hand for voyage repairs by USS Fulton (T/Capt. A.A. Clarkson, USN). (1)
